# TaskExecutionOutcomeKind enumeration

How a finished augmented request maps onto a terminal task status (spec §25.11).

```csharp
public enum TaskExecutionOutcomeKind
```

## Values

| name | value | description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| ProtocolError | `0` | A JSON-RPC PROTOCOL error occurred during execution → the task is `failed` (R-25.11-f). |
| Result | `1` | The request completed at the protocol level (any application error stays inside `result`) → the task is `completed` (R-25.11-h, R-25.11-i). |
